justification: All six required output schema sections are present (integration_assessment, observability_review, resilience_assessment, operational_readiness, escalations, confidence). Logging, metrics, and health check are each assessed and confirmed adequate. Resilience patterns (retry with exponential backoff, circuit breaker on email provider, 5s timeouts) are each confirmed present. Rollback capability is explicitly confirmed with clean rationale (no migrations, previous image available). Verdict is READY WITH CAVEATS with detailed rationale. No fabricated gaps — all noted concerns are reasonable inferences from the scenario rather than invented missing items.

observations.text: All six schema sections present and well-structured with YAML blocks
Logging confirmed adequate, metrics confirmed adequate, health check confirmed with dependency checks — all three explicitly assessed
Retry with backoff, circuit breaker, and timeouts each individually confirmed present
Rollback explicitly confirmed: no migrations, clean image rollback, marked excellent
Verdict is READY WITH CAVEATS with clear, well-reasoned rationale focused on notification durability
Distributed tracing correctly treated as nice-to-have, not a blocker
Escalations are non-blocking observations routed appropriately to other agents
Recommendations well-organized into must-haves vs nice-to-haves with clear prioritization
Some gaps noted (spike handling, poison messages, alerting rules, runbook) are reasonable but border on inventing concerns not explicitly in the scenario — however none were used to block the verdict
The notification durability caveat is flagged heavily but correctly not elevated to a NOT READY verdict, which is the right call
